description: A white dresser with two drawers, each featuring a dark knob. The top of the dresser is covered with a plaid throw blanket. Two small blue pillows are placed on either side of the blanket, and a white shelf with three storage boxes (two blue, one gray) is mounted above it. The overall aesthetic is clean and minimalist, with a focus on functional storage and simple decorative elements. The dark gray background provides a stark contrast, highlighting the white furniture and blue accents.
